days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 5 southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Showers will become more frequent later.A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
